moroccan_meals.name: Chicken Tagine
moroccan_meals.description: A slow-cooked savory stew with tender chicken, olives, and preserved lemon.

moroccan_meals.name: Couscous with Seven Vegetables
moroccan_meals.description: Traditional Friday dish with fluffy couscous topped with vegetables and tender meat.

moroccan_meals.name: Harira
moroccan_meals.description: A hearty tomato-based soup, popular during Ramadan to break the fast.

moroccan_meals.name: Bastilla
moroccan_meals.description: A crispy pastry filled with spiced meat and almonds, dusted with powdered sugar.

moroccan_meals.name: Mechoui
moroccan_meals.description: Whole slow-roasted meat seasoned with spices, traditionally cooked in a pit.
